parameters.body:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  model: 'claude-opus-4-7',
  max_tokens: 600,
  system: 'You write short, plain-text customer emails for The STR Ledger. Voice: direct, friendly, no fluff. Sign off as "— The STR Ledger". Output ONLY the email body — no subject line, no markdown, no preamble.',
  messages: [{
    role: 'user',
    content: 'Write a 7-days-after-purchase review request email using this template (fill in placeholders, keep tone, keep it short):

' +
      $json.first_name + ',

You picked up the ' + $json.product_name + ' a week ago — hope it has been useful.

If it has, would you drop a quick review? Takes 30 seconds and makes a huge difference for a small shop like ours:

[Leave a review on Etsy →] (' + $json.review_url + ')

If something did not work, hit reply. I will fix it.

— The STR Ledger

Return ONLY the final email body text.'
  }]
}) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({
  model: 'claude-opus-4-7',
  max_tokens: 600,
  system: 'You write short, plain-text customer emails for The STR Ledger. Voice: direct, friendly, no fluff. Sign off as "— The STR Ledger". Output ONLY the email body — no subject line, no markdown, no preamble.',
  messages: [{
    role: 'user',
    content: 'Write a 7-days-after-purchase review request email using this template (fill in placeholders, keep tone, keep it short):

' +
      $json.first_name + ',

You picked up the ' + $json.product_name + ' a week ago — hope it has been useful.

If it has, would you drop a quick review? Takes 30 seconds and makes a huge difference for a small shop like ours:

[Leave a review on Gumroad →] (' + $json.review_url + ')

If something did not work, hit reply. I will fix it.

— The STR Ledger

Return ONLY the final email body text.'
  }]
}) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({
  model: 'claude-opus-4-7',
  max_tokens: 600,
  system: 'You write short, plain-text customer emails for The STR Ledger. Voice: direct, friendly, no fluff. Sign off as "— The STR Ledger". Output ONLY the email body — no subject line, no markdown, no preamble.',
  messages: [{
    role: 'user',
    content: 'Write a 7-days-after-purchase testimonial-request email using this template (fill in placeholders, keep tone). Ask them to either reply with a 1-2 sentence testimonial OR drop a Trustpilot review:

' +
      $json.first_name + ',

You picked up the ' + $json.product_name + ' a week ago — hope it has been useful.

If it has, would you reply with a 1–2 sentence testimonial I can use? Or drop a quick review here, takes 30 seconds:

[Review on Trustpilot →] (' + $json.review_url + ')

If something did not work, hit reply. I will fix it.

— The STR Ledger

Return ONLY the final email body text.'
  }]
}) }}

parameters.text: ={{ '✅ W13 Review Requests sent — ' + $json.total_sent + ' emails for orders dated ' + $json.target_date + '\nEtsy: ' + $json.by_platform.etsy + ' | Gumroad: ' + $json.by_platform.gumroad + ' | IS: ' + $json.by_platform.is }}
